# Lisa Collio, Real Estate Agent

> Licensed real estate agent serving Goshen and Elkhart, Indiana.
> Bilingual service in English and Spanish. RE/MAX Results, The Viruez
> Team. Indiana license #RB21002460. REALTOR®, NAR® Member, SRES®
> Seniors Real Estate Specialist.

This site provides educational content for home buyers and sellers in
Goshen and Elkhart, Indiana, in both English and Spanish. All market
statistics come from the Elkhart County Board of REALTORS® MLS and are
dated at the point of publication. All client reviews are quoted
verbatim from their original source.

## Main pages
- [Buying a home in Goshen and Elkhart](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/buyers/): buyer guidance, process, and local market context
- [Selling a home in Goshen and Elkhart](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/sellers/): pricing strategy, preparation, and marketing
- [Meet Lisa Collio](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/about/): background, credentials, and approach
- [The Next Chapter Method™](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/next-chapter-method/): the six-step process used with every client
- [Market statistics](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/market-stats/): current Goshen and Elkhart market data, sourced from ECBOR MLS
- [Living in Goshen, Indiana](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/living-in-goshen/): factual community information
- [Moving to Goshen, Indiana](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/moving-to-goshen/): relocation guide — commutes, employers, schools, housing stock, costs, and trade-offs
- [Living in Elkhart, Indiana](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/living-in-elkhart/): factual community information
- [Contact](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/contact/): phone, email, office address

## Spanish-language pages
- [Comprar una casa](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/es/compradores/): guía para compradores en español
- [Vender su casa](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/es/vendedores/): guía para vendedores en español
- [Conozca a Lisa Collio](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/es/conozca-a-lisa/): trayectoria y credenciales
- [Tu Próximo Capítulo™](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/es/tu-proximo-capitulo/): el método de seis pasos
- [Estadísticas del mercado](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/es/estadisticas-del-mercado/): datos actuales del mercado
- [Vivir en Goshen, Indiana](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/es/viviendo-en-goshen/): guía local de la ciudad en español
- [Mudarse a Goshen, Indiana](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/es/mudarse-a-goshen/): guía de reubicación en español — trabajo, escuelas, casas, costos

## Articles
- [All articles](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/blog/): educational articles for buyers and sellers
- [Articles in Spanish](https://lisacolliorealtor.com/blog/spanish/): artículos en español

## Notes
- Service area: Goshen and Elkhart, Indiana only.
- Lisa Collio is a licensed real estate agent, not a mortgage lender.
  The site does not provide loan terms, rates, or qualification
  guidance.
- Equal Housing Opportunity.
